inputSummary.growthIntelligence: Keyword Opportunities / SERP Evidence / Questions / Competitors loaded from seo-data.

inputSummary.gsc: Waiting External Validation: GSC impressions/clicks/ranking/CTR are not included in the current opportunity input file.

inputSummary.dataForSEO: Loaded from Seed Library + DataForSEO Phase 2 successful run.

opportunities.currentWebsiteMatch: No direct existing page confirmed in current dataset; manual review required before publishing workflow.

existingAssetValue.rationale: No confirmed existing page asset is available in the current Opportunity Engine input.

opportunities.reason: DataForSEO shows real keyword and SERP evidence, no matching existing page is confirmed, and cannibalization risk is not high.
opportunities.whySeoAssetIsSafe: Allowed only when no confirmed existing asset match exists and cannibalization risk is not high.
